chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-304 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on urgent application 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 21.8.2025 Mr.Shoukat Ali Kaka, Advocate a/w Petitioners ********** 1. Granted. 2to4. Through this petition, the petitioners seek protection. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that petitioner No.1 has contracted a freewill marriage with petitioner No.2, which has allegedly annoyed the private respondents, who are now causing undue harassment to the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, learned Additional Advocate General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and submits that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide due protection to the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied with the statement made by the learned A.A.G and seeks disposal of the petition in the said terms. In view of the above, the instant petition stands disposed of, along with listed application with directions to the SHO of Police Station Pathoro (respondent No.5) to act strictly in accordance with law, and not to register any FIR against the petitioners in respect of the alleged abduction, as they 2 have contracted marriage of their own freewill. The SHOs concerned are further directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when approached. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the concerned SSPs for information and compliance. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
